**Infrastructure Operations Summary — 2026-07-19**

60+ routine operations performed across production, staging, QA, canary, dev, green/blue pools on 12 services: billing-worker, audit-logger, ingest-api, scheduler-core, search-indexer, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, user-profile-service, cache-warmer, report-builder, payment-gateway, auth-service, webhook-relay, metrics-collector, session-manager.

**Critical codes:** UP8ZG2KU (container registry), 954Y5RNF (incident), Y3YHEUAT (license), MCSPMXHC (deploy ticket), 2WM5G7KY (account), XST64RYF (API key), VVSYRUBB (TLS cert), H7YJ4H8D (on-call), FEG9SP9P (nonce), CFRWN4DP (flag), XTNHAQPF (SSH), ZWDF45AW (webhook), QFNSWMY6 (VPN), 9KDTFM7E (artifact), 5ARC433M (rollback), 4U9STJZ5 (cron).

Outcomes: normal latency, ahead/behind schedule, warnings cleared, queues drained, CPU/memory normalized, smoke tests passed, manual retries applied, logs archived, documentation updated. Threshold review pending next week. Pager quiet throughout.

**No active task defined for continuation.**
